top_signals.title: Womenswear Brand Reformation, Backer Seek $239 Million in IPO
top_signals.summary: Reformation Inc., a sustainable womenswear brand, and shareholders including its private equity backer Permira are seeking to raise as much as $239 million in its US initial public offering.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
